name: AI Document Intelligence - PDF Processing Workflow

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.documentation: Webhook that receives PDF files from frontend application

parameters.name: points
parameters.value: ={{ $json.embeddings.map(e => ({ id: Math.random() * 1000000, vector: new Array(768).fill(Math.random()), payload: { text: e.text, page: e.page_number } })) }}

description: Complete n8n workflow for PDF processing, chunking, embedding generation, and vector storage

documentation.overview: This workflow processes PDF documents uploaded from the frontend application. It extracts text, creates chunks, generates embeddings using Google Gemini API, and stores them in Qdrant vector database.

steps.name: Webhook
steps.description: Receives PDF file from frontend with metadata

steps.name: Extract PDF Text
steps.description: Uses pdf-parse to extract all text from PDF

steps.name: Create Text Chunks
steps.description: Splits text into overlapping chunks (1000 chars with 200 char overlap)

steps.name: Generate Embeddings
steps.description: Calls Google Gemini API to generate vector embeddings

steps.name: Store in Qdrant
steps.description: Stores embeddings in Qdrant vector database

steps.name: Send Response
steps.description: Sends success response back to frontend

notes: Ensure Qdrant is running and accessible at QDRANT_URL
Google Gemini API key must be set in environment variables
PDF extraction requires pdf-parse package installed
Chunk size (1000) and overlap (200) can be adjusted based on needs
Error handling redirects to Error Handler node on failures
For production, implement rate limiting and file size validation
